front_line: ServiceNow is the operating system for enterprise workflows.
thesis: ServiceNow sits on the proprietary record of how an enterprise actually operates, and AI agents need exactly that context to act safely. Watch. A genuinely durable platform at a price that already assumes durability; the verdict flips to Buy on a pullback or clear evidence that AI agent revenue is additive, and to Pass if net new ACV growth decelerates below 18%.
moat: Process system-of-record creates high switching costs and a data moat.
risks: Seat-based pricing is exposed if AI reduces headcount in IT, HR, and support.

drafts.x_post: ServiceNow ($NOW) is the operating system for enterprise workflows. Dead Simple Score: 91/100 · Gold. Status: Open.
video_talking_points: ServiceNow is the operating system for enterprise workflows.

ServiceNow sits on the proprietary record of how an enterprise actually operates, and AI agents need exactly that context to act safely. Watch. A genuinely durable platform at a price that already assumes durability; the verdict flips to Buy on a pullback or clear evidence that AI agent revenue is additive, and to Pass if net new ACV growth decelerates below 18%.
Moat: Process system-of-record creates high switching costs and a data moat.
Risk: Seat-based pricing is exposed if AI reduces headcount in IT, HR, and support.
Verdict: Light Add. Dead Simple Score 91/100.
